title: Artworx Calligraphy Pen Set - With Guide Book and Practice Paper - Caligraphy Beginners Set - Art and Crafts For Adults
features: THE COMPLETE STARTER SET - This comprehensive Calligraphy pen set contains everything you need to get started in the intriguing art of calligraphy set for beginners

SIMPLE TO USE, EASIER TO LEARN - Specially designed calligraphy pens to be easy to use, the cartridge pen system makes learning Calligraphy easier. Create amazing written artwork in no time. caligraphy beginners set for kids or adults.
FANTASTIC WRITING EXPERIENCE - The Calligraphy pens are comfortable to hold and allow smooth, pleasant writing with even ink flow

EASILY CREATE DIFFERENT EFFECTS - Caligraphy pens for writing with 5 different nib sizes and 4 fountain pens, you can easily switch writing styles to create amazing written work. Use the included Guide Book and Exercise Booklet to start you're learning journey
PREMIUM TIN PACKAGING - Keep your set safe and tidy in the included hinged tin box. Each piece has it's own designated spot within the tin
